party_affiliation.name: Partisanship
party_affiliation.question_text: Which party from the following list do you identify with the most?

options.13: I do not identify with any party

inparty_therm_1.name: In-party Feeling Thermometer
inparty_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward people who are supporters of {government_opposition}?

outparty_therm_1.name: Out-party Feeling Thermometer
outparty_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward people who are supporters of {government_opposition}?

general_trust.name: General Trust
general_trust.question_text: Do you think your wallet (or your valuables) would be returned to you if it were found by a stranger?

institutional_corruption.name: Institutional Corruption
institutional_corruption.question_text: If a member of Knesset were offered a bribe to influence the awarding of a government contract, do you think that the Knesset  member would accept or refuse the brib  e?

options.3: Equally likely to refuse or accept

institutional_response.name: Institutional Response
institutional_response.question_text: If you were to complain about the poor quality of a public service, how likely or unlikely is it that the problem would be easily resolved?

vote_importance.name: Importance of Voting
vote_importance.question_text: How important or unimportant is it to vote in every election?

pride.name: Pride in Citizenship
pride.question_text: How proud are you to be Israeli?

fair_treatment.name: Fair Treatment by Govt
fair_treatment.question_text: Do you agree or disagree that you can expect fair treatment from government authorities?

democracy_importance.name: Importance of Democracy
democracy_importance.question_text: How important or unimportant is it to you that you live in a representative democracy?

norm_judges.name: Judge Appointments
norm_judges.question_text: Do you agree or disagree with the following statement: It is appropriate that the representatives of the {government_opposition} ignore the ruling of the High Court of Justice if the ruling goes against their political position.

norm_judges_perception.name: Outparty: Judge Appointments
norm_judges_perception.question_text: In your opinion, what percentage of {government_opposition} supporters agree with the following statement: It is appropriate that the representatives of the {government_opposition} ignore the ruling of the High Court of Justice if the ruling goes against their political community.

norm_polling.name: Polling Stations
norm_polling.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: Members of the {government_opposition} place security cameras in {government_opposition} voting strongholds, to monitor the voting procedures.

norm_polling_perception.name: Outparty: Polling Stations
norm_polling_perception.question_text: In your opinion, what percentage of {government_opposition} supporters agree with the following statement: Members of the {government_opposition} place security cameras in {government_opposition}  voting strongholds, to monitor the voting procedures.

norm_executive.name: Rule of Law
norm_executive.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: It is appropriate that {government_opposition} ignore the attorney general if he harms their ability to achieve their goals.

norm_executive_perception.name: Outparty: Rule of Law
norm_executive_perception.question_text: In your opinion, what percentage of {government_opposition} supporters agree with the following statement: It is appropriate that the {government_opposition} ignore the attorney general if he harms their ability to achieve their goals.

norm_censorship.name: Censorship
norm_censorship.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: The {government_opposition} should have the authority to censor media outlets that spend more of their time attacking the {government_opposition} than the {government_opposition_out}.

norm_censorship_perception.name: Outparty: Censorship
norm_censorship_perception.question_text: In your opinion, what percentage of {government_opposition} supporters agree with the following statement: The {government_opposition_out} should have the authority to censor media outlets that spend more of their time attacking the {government_opposition_out} than the {government_opposition}.

norm_loyalty.name: Loyalty to Party over Police
norm_loyalty.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: When a member of the {government_opposition} claims that he is falsely accused by the police, it is important that the supporters of the {government_opposition} align themselves with the member of the {government_opposition} and not with the police.

norm_loyalty_perception.name: Outparty: Loyalty to Party over Police
norm_loyalty_perception.question_text: In your opinion, what percentage of {government_opposition} supporters agree with the following statement: When a member of the {government_opposition_out} claims that he is falsely accused by the police, it is important that the supporters of the {government_opposition_out} align themselves with the member of the {government_opposition_out} and not with the police.

violence1.name: 1. Support for Unlawful Protest
violence1.question_text: Please consider the following scenarios: {name} was convicted of unlawful assembly. He was arrested by the police after leading a demonstration against the {government_opposition} in front of the district court. He did not act to obtain the permits required for the demonstration and refused to leave when asked to do so by the police. Do you support or oppose the actions of {name}?

violence2.name: 2. Support for Vandalism
violence2.question_text: {name} Convicted of vandalism. He was arrested by the police after vandalizing several large billboards expressing support for {government_opposition}. Do you support or oppose the actions of {name}?

violence3.name: 3. Support for Assault
violence3.question_text: {name} was arrested for assault. He was arrested by police for throwing rocks at peaceful pro-{government_opposition} demonstrators. Although no serious injuries were reported, medical staff at the scene bandaged the head of one of the protesters who was hit by the stone. Do you support or oppose the actions of {name}?

violence4.name: 4. Support for Arson
violence4.question_text: {name} was convicted of setting fire to a public building. He was arrested by the police after he tried to escape from a fire he set in the headquarters of one of the {government_opposition} parties. Although he waited until the building closed at night, there were still people in several nearby buildings. Do you support or oppose the actions of {name}?

violence5.name: 5. Support for Assault with a Deadly Weapon
violence5.question_text: {name} was convicted of aggravated assault. He was arrested by the police after he drove his car into a crowd of {government_opposition} of the government who were participating in an approved demonstration in a public park. Although no one was killed, several protesters were seriously injured, and one was hospitalized for a month. Do you support or oppose the actions of {name}?

violence6.name: 6. Support for Murder
violence6.question_text: {name} was convicted of murder. He was arrested by the police after security camera footage was found in which he was seen stabbing to death a senior activist associated with the {government_opposition}. {name} committed the act because he thought the victim threatened the democratic nature of the country. Do you support or oppose the actions of {name}?

birthyr.name: Birth Year
birthyr.question_text: In what year were you born?

IL_edu.name: Education
IL_edu.question_text: What is the highest level of education you have completed?

options.3: Non-academic professional degree (Nurse, Technician, Teacher etc.)

race.name: Race
race.question_text: What ethnic group best describes you? Please select all that apply.

Income.name: Income
Income.question_text: What is your monthly gross household income before taxes and deductions?

IL_region.name: Region
IL_region.question_text: In which state do you currently reside?

Ideo10.name: Political Ideology
Ideo10.question_text: In political matters, people talk of "the left" and "the right". How would you place your views on this scale, generally speaking?

employ.name: Employment
employ.question_text: Which, if any, of the following options best describes your current employment status?

options.6: Taking care of home or family

lastvote_il.name: Vote 2022 Knesset elections
lastvote_il.question_text: Whether or not you voted in the Knesset elections in 2022, which party did you support, if any?

options.1: I did not vote / was not eligible to vote
